## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is for the bare-metal install script in this repo, not the Docker image.
- [ ] I updated README or docs if behavior, options, service names, paths, or defaults changed.
- [ ] I tested the affected path: install / client management / profile export / uninstall / docs only.
- [ ] I noted the Linux distribution, version, architecture, hosting environment, protocol, and port tested.
- [ ] I linked any relevant upstream OpenVPN or EasyRSA release, tag, commit, or issue.
- [ ] I did not include private keys, client certificates, `.ovpn` files, VPN credentials, or private data.
